title: Santa Cruz Monarch Movement Dashboard
text: Interactive exploration of monarch movement patterns, detection histories, and movement episodes from the Santa Cruz Monarch Telemetry Study.

title: Santa Cruz Monarch Movement Dashboard
text:
Available Explorers

Detection Explorer
Explore individual monarch detections through time and space.
Features:

Interactive map
Site boundaries
Behavioral states
Individual tag histories
Detection-level records



Episode Explorer
Explore movement episodes among sites.
Features:

Movement trajectories
Episode start and end locations
Behavioral classifications
Visit and foray episodes
Site transitions

title: Santa Cruz Monarch Movement Dashboard
Santa Cruz Monarch Movement Dashboard
text:
Data Included
The dashboard currently includes:

427,901 telemetry detections
3,452 movement episodes
41 individually tracked monarchs
Site boundary polygons
Behavior classifications:

Migration
Premigration
Winter

title: Santa Cruz Monarch Movement Dashboard
text:
This dashboard provides interactive exploration of movement patterns from the Santa Cruz monarch telemetry study led by Xerces Society and Point Blue Conservation Science.




View all telemetry detections by:

Behavior Type
Individual Tag




View movement episodes by:

Behavior Type
Episode Type
Individual Tag





Active and Other sites are displayed using the project site boundaries.



Each tag includes:

Tracking period
Number of detections
Number of visits
Number of forays
Primary site
Observed behavioral states


Data Source: Santa Cruz Monarch Telemetry Study
